methodology_sections: 2.3 Data Flow Tracing - Input flow, external data, asset movement, permission escalation
3.2 Business Logic Analysis - Economic incentives, edge cases, assumption violations, race conditions

path: msg.sender resolved to mainAccount via accountManager.getPlayer()
Validate ownership (munchNFT.ownerOf), plot availability, staking limit
Transfer NFT from mainAccount to LandManager contract
Update plotOccupied, munchablesStaked, munchableOwner, toilerState mappings
transformations: Landlord address mapped to plot count via lockManager.getLockedWeightedValue() / PRICE_PER_PLOT
Tax rate snapshot from plotMetadata[landlord].currentTaxRate into toilerState[tokenId].latestTaxRate
data_flows.trust_changes: NFT custody transitions from user to contract; user trusts contract for safekeeping and correct reward accounting
exposure_risks: NFT locked in contract with no emergency withdrawal mechanism
manipulation_risks: Off-by-one allows 11 staked NFTs instead of intended 10
Landlord can change tax rate between rentor's stake and farm calls

path: Resolve mainAccount and renterMetadata via accountManager.getPlayer()
Iterate over munchablesStaked[mainAccount]
For each token: check dirty flag, resolve landlord, check plot validity
Fetch immutableAttributes from nftAttributesManager
Calculate finalBonus from REALM_BONUSES and RARITY_BONUSES
Calculate schnibblesTotal = (timestamp - lastToilDate) * BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE
Apply bonus: schnibblesTotal = (schnibblesTotal + schnibblesTotal * finalBonus) / 100
Split via tax: schnibblesLandlord = schnibblesTotal * latestTaxRate / 1e18
Update toilerState timestamps and tax rates
Update renter and landlord Player metadata via accountManager.updatePlayer()
transformations: Realm/Rarity bonuses applied as percentage adjustment
Tax rate split between landlord and rentor
Signed integer arithmetic for bonus calculation (CRITICAL: potential negative result cast to uint256)
data_flows.trust_changes: Trusts nftAttributesManager for correct attribute data; trusts configStorage for valid bonus arrays; trusts accountManager for correct player storage
validation_points: Plot count vs plotId check (BUGGY: uses < instead of <=)
manipulation_risks: Negative finalBonus <= -100 causes int256-to-uint256 underflow producing massive schnibbles
Dirty flag plotId check off-by-one: _getNumPlots(landlord) < _toiler.plotId misses boundary case

Landlord metadata fetched and updated per-iteration inside loop but renter metadata accumulated and written once; multiple tokens with different landlords who are each individually updated could cause stale reads if accountManager has complex logic

path: forceFarmPlots modifier runs first (harvests accrued rewards)
Resolve mainAccount, validate ownership and staking status
Check new plot availability and bounds
Update latestTaxRate in toilerState
Clear old plotOccupied, set new plotOccupied
MISSING: toilerState[tokenId].plotId is NEVER updated to new plotId
manipulation_risks: CRITICAL: plotId not updated in toilerState means unstakeMunchable will clear the OLD (already cleared) plot, leaving the NEW plot permanently occupied and locked
Subsequent _farmPlots dirty-flag check will use stale plotId, potentially marking token dirty incorrectly or missing the dirty condition

path: Load contract addresses (LockManager, AccountManager, MunchNFT, NFTAttributesManager)
Load uint config values using WRONG StorageKeys
Load array bonuses (REALM_BONUSES, RARITY_BONUSES)
transformations: Raw storage values assigned to state variables
data_flows.trust_changes: Full trust in configStorage for correct values
manipulation_risks: HIGH: MIN_TAX_RATE loaded from StorageKey.LockManager, MAX_TAX_RATE from StorageKey.AccountManager, DEFAULT_TAX_RATE from StorageKey.ClaimManager, BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE from StorageKey.MigrationManager, PRICE_PER_PLOT from StorageKey.NFTOverlord — these keys are designed for contract addresses, not uint configuration values. This will likely load incorrect/zero values.
If PRICE_PER_PLOT loads as 0, _getNumPlots will revert with division by zero

path: Validate landlord registration
Validate newTaxRate within MIN/MAX bounds
Validate plotMetadata exists (lastUpdated != 0)
Directly update plotMetadata[landlord].currentTaxRate
transformations: Direct assignment of new tax rate
manipulation_risks: No farming is triggered for existing stakers before rate change; landlord can front-run rentor farm calls to change rate, though the latestTaxRate snapshot in toilerState provides partial protection for the current period
A landlord can set rate to MAX right before a rentor calls farmPlots; the snapshot protects current period but the newly stored rate applies to the NEXT accumulation period immediately

core_rules: Rentors stake NFTs on landlord plots; landlords derive plot count from locked value
Schnibbles accrue linearly over time at BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE, modified by realm and rarity bonuses
Landlord earns tax portion of rentor schnibbles based on latestTaxRate
Each plot can hold at most one NFT; plotId must be < _getNumPlots(landlord)
Users cannot stake to their own plots
Maximum staked NFTs per account (intended 10, actual 11 due to off-by-one)
economic_incentives: Landlords are incentivized to lock more value (more plots -> more rentor capacity -> more tax revenue)
Rentors choose landlords with favorable tax rates and matching realms for bonus
Higher rarity NFTs produce more schnibbles via RARITY_BONUSES
Matching realms between NFT and landlord's snuggeryRealm provide bonus via REALM_BONUSES
governance_mechanisms: ConfigStorage admins set MIN/MAX/DEFAULT tax rates, BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE, PRICE_PER_PLOT, and bonus arrays
configUpdated() callable only by configStorage to trigger reconfiguration
updatePlotMetadata() callable only by AccountManager contract

edge_cases.scenario: transferToUnoccupiedPlot does not update toilerState[tokenId].plotId to the new plotId
edge_cases.expected_behavior: toilerState.plotId should reflect the new plot after transfer
edge_cases.actual_behavior: toilerState.plotId remains the OLD plotId. On unstake, plotOccupied[landlord][oldPlotId] is cleared (already empty), while plotOccupied[landlord][newPlotId] stays occupied=true forever, permanently locking that plot.
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: A malicious rentor can transfer to a plot, then unstake. The new plot is permanently locked (occupied=true with no way to clear it), performing a griefing DoS on that plot for the landlord. Repeated exploitation can brick all of a landlord's plots.

edge_cases.scenario: Negative finalBonus <= -100 causes int256 to uint256 underflow
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Schnibbles should be capped at zero or calculation should revert when bonus makes total negative
edge_cases.actual_behavior: uint256 cast of a negative int256 produces a massive number (close to 2^256), minting astronomical schnibbles to both rentor and landlord
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: If REALM_BONUSES or RARITY_BONUSES configuration allows combined bonus <= -100, any staker with such an NFT+realm combination can farm effectively infinite schnibbles. Even -101 total bonus would underflow.

edge_cases.scenario: Dirty flag boundary off-by-one: _getNumPlots(landlord) < _toiler.plotId instead of <=
edge_cases.expected_behavior: If landlord's plots reduce so that plotId is no longer valid (plotId >= numPlots), the dirty flag should trigger
edge_cases.actual_behavior: When numPlots equals plotId (e.g., numPlots=5, plotId=5), the check 5 < 5 = false, so dirty flag is NOT set, but plotId 5 is invalid when only plots 0-4 exist. When numPlots equals plotId exactly, the token continues farming normally on a non-existent plot.
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: Rentor continues farming on a plot that technically doesn't exist anymore since landlord unlocked value. The landlord still pays tax on schnibbles they shouldn't be generating.

edge_cases.scenario: Staking limit allows 11 instead of 10 NFTs
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Maximum of 10 staked NFTs per account
edge_cases.actual_behavior: Check is `length > 10`, meaning when length is exactly 10 (0..9 already staked), the push succeeds making it 11
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: Minor deviation from intended game rules; one extra NFT can be staked

edge_cases.scenario: Configuration keys mismatch in _reconfigure() - uint values loaded from address-type StorageKeys
edge_cases.expected_behavior: MIN_TAX_RATE, MAX_TAX_RATE, DEFAULT_TAX_RATE, BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE, PRICE_PER_PLOT should be loaded from dedicated configuration keys
edge_cases.actual_behavior: Values loaded from StorageKey.LockManager, StorageKey.AccountManager, etc. which are meant for contract addresses. Depending on ConfigStorage implementation, this returns wrong values or zero.
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: If PRICE_PER_PLOT becomes 0, _getNumPlots reverts with division by zero, bricking all staking/unstaking/farming. If MIN_TAX_RATE and MAX_TAX_RATE are both 0 or wrong, tax rate validation breaks. If BASE_SCHNIBBLE_RATE is wrong, economic calculations are incorrect.

edge_cases.scenario: PRICE_PER_PLOT is zero causing division by zero in _getNumPlots
edge_cases.actual_behavior: Division by zero reverts, making stakeMunchable, unstakeMunchable, transferToUnoccupiedPlot, and farmPlots all revert — complete contract DoS
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: If config error sets PRICE_PER_PLOT to 0, all NFTs are stuck in the contract with no way to unstake

edge_cases.scenario: Landlord reduces locked value after rentors have staked on high-numbered plots
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Dirty mechanism should handle this gracefully for all affected plotIds
edge_cases.actual_behavior: Due to the < vs <= bug, boundary plotIds are missed. Also, the dirty mechanism only triggers once and uses lastUpdated timestamp which may not reflect the actual time the plot became invalid if landlord updated metadata multiple times.
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: Stakers on boundary plots continue earning rewards on non-existent plots; inaccurate reward calculation

edge_cases.scenario: Landlord changes tax rate without farming existing stakers
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Fair transition: current period should use old rate, new rate applies only to future periods
edge_cases.actual_behavior: The latestTaxRate in toilerState provides period-level protection, but landlord can manipulate timing: set rate to MAX, wait for rentor to farm (which stores MAX for next period), then rentor accrues at MAX rate until they notice and unstake
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: Landlord attracts stakers with low tax, then raises to MAX after they stake. Rentors must monitor and react, but have no protection mechanism beyond manually unstaking.

edge_cases.scenario: uint8 loop iterator in _farmPlots for staked array length
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Loop should handle all staked tokens
edge_cases.actual_behavior: uint8 i max is 255, but staked length max is 11 (due to off-by-one), so no overflow. However, using uint8 is a latent risk if the limit ever changes.
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: Currently not exploitable due to staking limit, but fragile design

edge_cases.scenario: Rentor with multiple tokens staked with same landlord — landlord metadata updated multiple times per farm
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Each schnibbles addition for the landlord accumulates correctly
edge_cases.actual_behavior: landlordMetadata is re-fetched from accountManager each iteration and re-written. If accountManager.updatePlayer is synchronous and getPlayer reflects latest state, this works. But if there's caching or the storage model is different, schnibbles for all but the last token could be lost.
edge_cases.exploitation_potential: Depends on accountManager implementation; if updatePlayer/getPlayer are not perfectly synchronous, landlord loses accumulated schnibbles from earlier iterations

assumption_violations: Assumption: StorageKeys used in _reconfigure map to the correct uint config values — VIOLATED: uses contract address keys
Assumption: REALM_BONUSES + RARITY_BONUSES combined never exceeds -100 — NOT VALIDATED in code; if violated, causes uint256 underflow
Assumption: PRICE_PER_PLOT > 0 — NOT VALIDATED; zero causes complete DoS
Assumption: accountManager.updatePlayer() writes are immediately visible via getPlayer() — required for correct multi-landlord farming in a single call
Assumption: transferToUnoccupiedPlot updates all necessary state — VIOLATED: plotId in toilerState not updated
Assumption: NFT can always be transferred back on unstake — could fail if contract is paused at ERC721 level or there's an approval issue
game_theory_risks: Landlord bait-and-switch: attract stakers with low tax, raise to MAX, earn outsized fees until stakers react
Griefing via transferToUnoccupiedPlot bug: permanently lock landlord plots by transferring then unstaking
Landlord can reduce locked value to invalidate plots and manipulate dirty flag behavior to reduce rentor rewards
Rentor can avoid farming to accumulate large reward claims, potentially gaming any external systems dependent on schnibbles timing
integration_risks: lockManager.getLockedWeightedValue() return value directly controls plot availability; any manipulation of locked value or its calculation affects plot counts
accountManager.updatePlayer() is called inside a loop with potentially stale data; complex accountManager logic could cause unexpected behavior
nftAttributesManager.getImmutableAttributes() trusted completely for realm and rarity values; compromised or buggy attributes manager can manipulate rewards
munchNFT.transferFrom() failures inside unstake would lock NFTs permanently
ConfigStorage key-value semantics must exactly match expectations; apparent mismatch in current code
calculation_errors: schnibblesTotal uint256 cast of potentially negative int256: `uint256((int256(schnibblesTotal) + (int256(schnibblesTotal) * finalBonus)) / 100)` — negative result wraps to ~2^256

Tax split `schnibblesLandlord = (schnibblesTotal * _toiler.latestTaxRate) / 1e18` assumes latestTaxRate is in 1e18 scale (wei-based percentage); if tax rate bounds are misconfigured due to wrong StorageKeys, this produces wrong splits
Rentor receives `schnibblesTotal - schnibblesLandlord` which could underflow if schnibblesLandlord > schnibblesTotal (possible if latestTaxRate > 1e18 due to config error)

token_semantics.notes: ERC721 NFT used for staking. Contract takes custody via transferFrom. No callback hooks documented but ERC721 safeTransfer not used (uses transferFrom), so no reentrancy via onERC721Received.
Not an ERC20 token; tracked as unfedSchnibbles field in Player struct via accountManager. Can be inflated via negative bonus underflow bug.

invariants.name: plot_occupancy_consistency
invariants.notes: VIOLATED by transferToUnoccupiedPlot: toilerState.plotId not updated, causing desync between plotOccupied and toilerState

invariants.name: nft_custody_accounting
invariants.notes: Must stay synchronized: if NFT is in contract, munchableOwner and munchablesStaked must reflect it

invariants.name: schnibbles_conservation
invariants.notes: schnibblesTotal = schnibblesLandlord + rentor_schnibbles must hold; violated if schnibblesTotal underflows to massive uint256 from negative bonus

invariants.name: tax_rate_bounds
invariants.notes: currentTaxRate must be in [MIN_TAX_RATE, MAX_TAX_RATE]; may be violated if config keys are wrong and bounds are zero/incorrect

invariants.name: staking_limit
invariants.notes: Intended max 10, actual max 11 due to > instead of >= check
